jobTitle: Sr Marketing Manager, 1stdibs Gallery and Vintage & Antique
jobDescription: In this newly created role as Senior Manager, Integrated Marketing, 1stdibs Gallery and Vintage & Antique you will be responsible for leading cross-channel marketing efforts to drive awareness, traffic, customer acquisition and engagement for 1stdibs’s exciting new gallery space in south Hudson Yards, New York. You will also lead marketing for 1stdibs’s leading category, Vintage & Antique Furniture, driving strategic and tactical marketing campaigns to grow revenue from this category, both, online and through the 1stdibs Gallery. This role is perfect for someone who thrives in a design-focused, fast-paced and results-driven environment and who is looking to leverage their experience in digital marketing to spearhead the success of a successful category, and an exciting new retail space. You’d be a true 1stdibs brand advocate, working closely with partners on Supply, Marketing, Product, Gallery Ops and Trade teams. About the 1stdibs Gallery The 1stdibs Gallery is New York City’s premier design destination, where visitors can shop, touch, see and be inspired by everything from antique treasures to vintage finds to the best new and custom creations from around the world, all in one place. While 1stdibs is regarded as the design industry’s leading e-commerce platform, our 45,000 square foot brick-and-mortar retail channel supports our goal to serve our customers and their personal shopping preferences. What you’ll do Marketing Strategy & Execution - Vintage & Antique Drive growth in new and repeat customers by developing and executing marketing strategies in partnership with marketing, seller and product teams across the organization Paid media strategy across Google, Facebook, Pinterest, Display etc. Email touchpoints, website and mobile app experiences Print (catalog, direct mail), Social campaigns, Editorial, PR, Events and more1stdibs Gallery Trade ( Interior Designers) marketing Work with channel owners and Business Analytics to test and measure campaign strategies to optimize performance and marketing channels Shape customer-centric, cross-channel marketing and engagement strategy to build awareness, growth and excitement the category Gallery Marketing  Work cross-functionally with colleagues in Marketing ( Paid, Email, Social, Events, Content), Supply, Trade and Gallery Ops teams to create beautiful omni-channel experiences, ensure smooth campaign execution, and achieve all business goals Create and own Gallery marketing calendar including 360 and targeted launches to keep the space fresh and relevant Launch targeted online and offline campaigns to drive awareness, traffic, sales and glean market intelligence Manage the gallery landing page, print collateral, and google business account Partnerships & Events Work with key cross functional partners to initiate and develop strategic marketing partnerships and local market activations to meet goals Develop supporting online, offline and social marketing strategy to amplify programming Coordinate event requests with Gallery exhibitors and manage communication with dealers Project Management Drive end-to-end campaign development & execution​ Work collaboratively with cross-functional partners across Email, Paid, Social, Site, Editorial and Events to ensure smooth execution of campaigns Create timelines, briefs and manage asset delivery of digital/physical collateral Partner with external vendors (when applicable), manage/oversee scope of work Measurement & Effectiveness Evaluation of campaign ROI and actionable inputs post evaluation Measure and track effectiveness of the gallery as an immersive brand experience Campaign reach, engagement and conversion Manage and adhere to Marketing, Gallery and Programming budget What you’ll bring Customer Focus A real passion for digital and retail marketing with a track-record that shows it8+ years of relevant marketing experience Experience working a nimble team environment with fast-growing expectations Well-organized and detail-oriented enough to lead multiple cross-functional initiatives Strong written and verbal communication skills Bachelor's degree required.  MBA preferred. Digital native Self-starter, with great sense of humor and comfort with change Experience working in luxury goods/design a plus
